Localization.Description: Boot files and OS kernel files were changed in order to start automatically on OS boot or logon

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to change the OS kernel on host {event_src.host} for programs to start automatically
A likely attempt to add malicious code to OS boot file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host} was detected
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to OS boot files on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to OS boot files on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to OS boot file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to change the OS kernel on host {event_src.host} for programs to start automatically
OS boot files were changed on host {event_src.host}
A likely attempt to change the OS kernel on host {event_src.host} for programs to start automatically was detected
A user with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to OS boot file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
